description: §6.8.2 compound single-field reset (RT): reset(@form.name) reverts ONLY the name field to its default=; the sibling email keeps its typed value. Snapshot keys form.name / form.email.
rationale: §6.8.2 compound reset: `reset(@form.name)` applies the reset rule to the named field ONLY (its default='def-name'). The sibling @form.email keeps its typed value. fill() sets both to typed-*; resetName() reverts only name.
